10	Switch Conciergeâ¢ by ClickSWITCH
10.1	Overview of Switch Concierge by ClickSWITCH
Switch Concierge is a third-party service offered through ClickSWITCH that allows new and existing customers to move automated payments and direct deposits from one financial institution to another and close the original account. Switch Concierge is available to customers of subscribing financial institutions via online banking or in branch via
PaymentStream
TM
Direct. This chapter describes how to access Switch Concierge via
PaymentStream
Direct. For general information on Switch Concierge, visit the Switch Concierge product page on the Client Centre. See Section 1.2, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources.
10.2	Accessing Switch Concierge
To access Switch Concierge via
PaymentStream
Direct:
Access the appropriate customerâs profile as described in Section 7.2, Accessing a Customerâs Profile.
Select
ClickSWITCH
. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Selecting ClickSWITCH
Choose the accounts to enroll and select
Enroll and Sign in Now
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Choosing the Account to Enroll
Complete the Switch Concierge session as directed on the ClickSWITCH website.
Related Information
Switch Concierge product page
